creator: sergiocava@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 226894
terminal output with multimedia/kdenlive crash

I'm using FreeBSD 13.0-RELEASE, with the latest repository. 
Today the multimedia/kdenlive port has been updated from version 21.04.3 to version 21.04.3_1. 
It worked perfectly, however, after the update, the software doesn't open anymore. 
It just opens only the presentation image and crash. 
Attached, I forward the output from terminal.
